project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Media File Metadata (Images, Videos, License Info)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: Gallery fetches image/video metadata from MediaWiki API including descriptions, captions, license info, artist attribution, and EXIF metadata.

flow_steps.code: fun newIntent(context: Context, pageTitle: PageTitle?, filename: String, wiki: WikiSite, revision: Long? = null): Intent
flow_steps.details: User taps image in article. Gallery opens with specified filename and wiki site.

flow_steps.code: @GET(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=query&prop=imageinfo&iiprop=timestamp|user|url|mime|metadata|extmetadata") suspend fun getImageInfo(@Query("titles") titles: String, @Query("iiextmetadatalanguage") lang: String)
flow_steps.details: Image metadata fetched from Commons API including timestamps, uploader, URLs, MIME type, EXIF metadata, and license info.

flow_steps.code: @GET(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=query&prop=videoinfo&viprop=timestamp|user|url|mime|metadata|extmetadata|derivatives") suspend fun getVideoInfo(@Query("titles") titles: String, @Query("viextmetadatalanguage") lang: String)
flow_steps.details: Video metadata fetched including derivatives info for video files.
Fetches gallery items (images/videos) from the API for the given page. Manages pagination via continue parameters.

flow_steps.code: override fun onDownload(item: GalleryItemFragment) { item.mediaInfo?.let { downloadReceiver.download(this, item.imageTitle, it) } }
flow_steps.details: User can download media to device storage. File saved via WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE permission.

flow_steps.code: override fun onShare(item: GalleryItemFragment, bitmap: Bitmap?, ...) { ShareUtil.shareImage(lifecycleScope, this, bitmap, ...) }
flow_steps.details: Media can be shared to external apps via Android share intent.
